roots_examined: construction builder and supplied authorities only; owner staffing and real artifacts unavailable
queries_executed: construction-stage authority and builder reads recorded
queries_remaining: resolve every owner actor and artifact
record every target-bank and source-packet delivery
audit fresh-chair packet and prior reads
execute full frozen-manifest ancestry query list
excluded_or_veiled: semantic uptake from a recorded read
stopping_rule: complete only when every frozen actor, artifact, read, calibration, source-packet delivery, and role identifier resolves; the fixed queries run once against the closed manifest; and unavailable answers become named unknowns
